race.comment: TRIUMVIRATE (4) was well in commission last start over 1200m at Wagga when second, beaten 4 lengths, which was the third top-three finish from three starts this time in. The run prior, when just behind PRESTIGE MADDY (9), looks the key form reference for this race. That being the case, PRESTIGE MADDY looks the main danger. She was plain last start after missing the kick but gets blinkers here, which might help her get back to her best. CUMULATE (5) was beaten a long way last start, but so were most of his rivals and he might be better suited back slightly in trip here. PRINCESS PRUSSIA (10) wasn't served well at the barrier draw, but probably would have gone back anyway, so she shouldn't be discounted on the wide draw and if they can run on she warrants consideration. BLACKLIP (1) is back after a break of 10 weeks and was adequate in a recent Werribee jumpout. Among the chances while fresh.
